artifacts.summary: Discovery found one official MISIS pedagogical-mastery subdomain page with policy-relevant AI professional-development content for university employees. Other official AI-related pages were rejected because they were student program marketing, presentation material, news, or otherwise not a formal AI-use policy.

artifacts.sourceTitle: AI-революция: как использовать технологии для роста и развития
artifacts.verificationNotes: Firecrawl scraped the official MISIS pedagogical-mastery subdomain page. The page links to MISIS, uses a MISIS logo block, lists MISIS staff, and describes an AI professional-development program for university employees.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Искусственный интеллект и анализ данных в цифровой экономике

artifacts.verificationNotes: Firecrawl scraped this official MISIS page; it describes an AI/data professional retraining program for students but does not give AI-use policy, academic-integrity, privacy, or assessment guidance.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Искусственный интеллект в образовании: возможности, перспективы, угрозы
artifacts.verificationNotes: Firecrawl opened the official-subdomain PDF and extracted initial pages, but the document is presentation material about AI in education rather than institutional AI-use policy.

artifacts.notes: The page is official and AI-related, but it describes an educational program rather than rules or guidance for AI tool use.

artifacts.title: MISIS AI professional-development source review
artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery for The National University of Science and Technology MISIS found AI-related program and presentation pages but no formal university-wide AI policy. The citation-ready candidates are limited to an official MISIS pedagogical-mastery page describing an AI professional-development program for university employees.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No formal MISIS student-facing generative-AI policy, assessment rule, privacy rule, procurement rule, or academic-integrity rule was found in the searched official sources.
The approved candidate claims are scoped to staff professional development/training content and should not be promoted as a binding university-wide policy without further official evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
